risks.observedIssue: Estimated contrast is borderline for normal text.
risks.evidence: Computed estimate is 4.3:1 for #171717 text on #5B6CFF accent.
risks.recommendedAction: In a future CSS-only patch, increase active tab contrast by adjusting text color, accent shade, or active tab treatment.

risks.observedIssue: The 420px static screenshot clips the right side of the STOP button.
risks.evidence: Static screenshot at 420x1200 shows partial right-edge clipping; 520px screenshot shows full button.
risks.recommendedAction: Evaluate responsive top bar behavior before any HTML or layout change. CSS-only spacing may be considered later.

risks.selectorOrSurface: hidden consent, handoff, runtime, blocked timeline states
risks.observedIssue: Static render did not expose every hidden or live state.
risks.evidence: Only Operate tab initial render was captured in Chrome headless; hidden states were audited through CSS and HTML references.
risks.recommendedAction: Run interactive extension QA before approving HTML, JS, manifest, or behavior work.

risks.observedIssue: Dead-style cleanup was not performed in this audit-only block.
risks.evidence: No CSS edits were made; M621 preserved all sidepanel product files.
risks.recommendedAction: Proceed only with small CSS-only cleanup backed by selector evidence.
